supplies.title: Awl
supplies.rationale:
- Sloyd: Used for scoring folds and punching holes. 
- Handicrafts: Used in the leather craft Handicraft lessons during Term 3.
supplies.note: You do not need to purchase another if you purchase the one included in the leather working kit.

supplies.title: Twine or String
supplies.rationale: Used for tying certain models together or putting hanging strings on models.

Sloyd: Level 1

Sloyd: Level 4

supplies.title: 18" Ruler
supplies.rationale: The 18” ruler is particularly helpful for upper level Sloyd when you are working on larger projects.
supplies.maySub: any 18" ruler, but metal with cork backing is helpful to prevent the ruler from sliding on your paper.

supplies.title: X-Acto Knife
supplies.maySub: any style X-Acto knife or box cutter.
supplies.usedInText:
Sloyd: Level 2
Sloyd: Level 3
Sloyd: Level 4
Sloyd: Level 5
Sloyd: Level 6

supplies.title: Cutting Mat
supplies.rationale: Will need something to protect work surface when using an X-Acto knife.
supplies.maySub: any size cutting mat or thick cardboard to protect work surface.
supplies.usedInText:
Sloyd: Level 2
Sloyd: Level 3
Sloyd: Level 4
Sloyd: Level 5
Sloyd: Level 6

supplies.title: Easel
supplies.rationale:
- Art: Used to hold drawing board. Students may optionally hold board in lap.
- Sloyd: Optional but highly advisable.
supplies.note: May also be used in lower Art levels to hold art board if using as a chalkboard.
supplies.maySub: any easel similar to a drafting table that allows students to work in an upright position, as opposed to hunching over work and wanting to turn their paper as they are working.

supplies.title: Hole Punch
supplies.maySub: any as long as it is 1/8" (or use awl).

supplies.title: T-Square
supplies.note: Optional, but helpful for making straight lines and square corners.

supplies.title: Household Items - Sloyd: Level 2
supplies.note:
Typically easy for students to scavenge or teachers to obtain locally:
- wax paper (T1)
- stapler (T1)
- sand paper (T2)
